title: ブライト・イン・アンダーワールド

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While we're on our way back from an outing,
Mejiro Bright comes to a stop in front of a store
window.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My! Just look at those ocean blue eyes. I wonder
if she'd be friends with Maki.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yes, Maki's my doll... and a precious friend.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
She can be rather shy, but she gives everything
her all, and she has a heart of gold.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...I'd like to take a closer look at the doll. This
may take some time, so do feel free to head back
without me.
choice_data_list: Actually, if you don't mind, Bright...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I let her know I'd like to accompany her, and we
go inside. The shop is full of antiques and dolls of
all shapes and sizes... It's like standing inside a
fairy tale.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: They're all gorgeous... The one with the blue eyes, this one with snow-white hair... Sigh... Oh, and this little one, too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That doll over there would look stunning in a
dress with a scala lace trim... Oh, they're all so
adorable. I simply cannot make up my mind. ♪
choice_data_list: They each have their own charm.
They each have their own charm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you're absolutely right! Look closer, and you
can see the subtle differences in their
expressions, yes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
This one with the curled eyelashes has an
outgoing personality, while the one with the
pouty lips looks bashful.
choice_data_list: Maki's on the shy side, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
She is indeed! And that's why she needs a friend
to give her the extra push she needs, just as Ryan
and Dober have with me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What to do... The pink one is cute, but it's a
little...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hello, Dober! ♪ Are you shopping as well?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Bright?! I, um, well... just wandered in on a whim!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I've been wanting a new teacup, you see! There
were some nice ones in the shop window, so I
came inside to have a look! It's not like I was
attracted by the adorable items here! Not at all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: M-more importantly! It's surprising to see you here, Bright! And with company, no less!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're quite right. Trainer is here to offer
some assistance in my search for a friend for
Maki.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Maki... Is she the one we often had tea
parties with when we were little?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yes, she's my dear friend... and my treasure.
choice_data_list: You've been friends for a very long time.
You've been friends for a very long time.

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for the wait, Miss Dober. About your
membership card—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...?! O-oh! You mean the card I happened to find
on the floor?! You've found the owner? Fantastic!
I'll just be on my way, then!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I-I have somewhere to be!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well then, please excuse me! I wish you success in
your search.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It seems Dober is rather busy. As for me, though, I
think I'll be needing a little more time to decide
who I'll be taking home...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Is that all right with you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...! Thank you! ♪ I'll be sure to find the perfect
companion for Maki!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright closely examines all the dolls in the
shop... but closing time arrives before she can
make up her mind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: The one with ruby-red eyes was so delightful! But the one with the ocean blue eyes had the air of an older sister... Oh, but then... so did the one with amber eyes...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Should I bring them all home? But then Maki
would be overwhelmed by all the new faces!
choice_data_list:
You look pretty happy for someone who's
fretting.

You look pretty happy for someone who's
fretting.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I am. I enjoy this time as well, you see—the
time spent weighing up options.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But... it seems time is a luxury we no longer have.
I do hope you're not too tired, Trainer.
choice_data_list: I'm just glad to see you having fun.
I'm just glad to see you having fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... You grace me with such kind words.
Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! As I tend to conduct these searches on my
own, having some company made for a
surprisingly nice change of pace. Today was a lot
of fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I've so very many things to tell Maki when I get
home! ♪
choice_data_list:
There's more to dolls than just the collecting,
isn't there?

There's more to dolls than just the collecting,
isn't there?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I've so very many things to tell Maki when I get
home! ♪
choice_data_list:
There's more to dolls than just the collecting,
isn't there?

There's more to dolls than just the collecting,
isn't there?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, firstly, I'll tell her about Dober. She
mentioned that she was looking for a teacup, so
I'll discuss with Maki which one to gift her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'd also like to discuss a design idea that came to
me while I was looking for a new friend for her.
And then, lastly...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I wish to share your kind words with her, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I can only hope we manage to cover
everything before sunrise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her gently to try and get to sleep at a
decent hour.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! If you're curious, do consider taking
one home for yourself. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Meeting new friends is difficult, but the process is
so much fun... Perhaps you know the feeling?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure that fate will guide you to a wondrous
encounter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I eagerly await the day we can all enjoy a tea
party together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home, Mejiro Bright cheerfully tells
me all about the wonders of dolls.
